title: Unit Converter (Length, Weight, Temperature)
metaDescription: Convert between metric and imperial units of length, weight, and temperature instantly in your browser.
shortDescription: Convert between common length, weight, and temperature units.

guideSections.heading: Why Temperature Conversion Isn't Just a Multiplier
guideSections.body: Length and weight conversions are simple ratios — multiply by a fixed factor and you're done. Temperature scales have different zero points as well as different scale sizes, which is why converting Celsius to Fahrenheit requires both a multiplication and an addition, not just a single conversion factor like the other categories here.

guideSections.heading: Why Kelvin Has No Negative Values
guideSections.body: Kelvin is an absolute temperature scale starting at absolute zero, the theoretical point where all thermal motion stops — there is no physical meaning to a negative Kelvin value, which is why this tool flags it as an error rather than returning a number that doesn't correspond to anything real.
